jobs.title: Cyber Security Analyst (DevSecOps) Job FinSense Africa
jobs.description: IT Jobs. FinSense Africa Jobs. Looking for an IT job in Kenya? FinSense Africa is recruiting a Cyber Security Analyst (DevSecOps) position. Proficiency in DevSecOps, application security, and vulnerability assessment is required.
responsibilities: Work with scrum and project teams to ensure that security requirements are adequately captured during the requirements analysis phase.
Provide input into the secure design of information systems architecture throughout the project lifecycle.
Ensure that access to systems during the project lifecycle by staff, contractors, and vendors is secure and based on the principle of least privilege.
Enforce the implementation and adoption of minimum security baseline standards across all technologies in use.
Facilitate the identification of security vulnerabilities by performing or coordinating security assessments, vulnerability assessments, and penetration testing (VAPT).
Ensure security tools and controls are operating as expected within development and deployment pipelines and review security reports generated from them.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or other STEM-related discipline.
Master’s degree in Information Security, Cyber Security, or related field will be an added advantage.

Professional information security certifications such as CISA, CISM, CISSP, CRISC, or Security+, as well as application/security testing certifications such as CSSLP, CEH, OSCP, CPT, GPEN, GWAPT, or eJPT.
3+ years of experience in technology roles.
1+ years of experience in information security.

requirements: Experience with hybrid cloud/on-premises architectures – you have managed infrastructure that spans cloud and physical environments simultaneously.

jobs.title: Tech Lead – Messaging Experience Engineering Job Watu Credit
jobs.company: Messaging Experience Engineering Job Watu Credit
jobs.description: IT Jobs, Watu Credit Jobs. Looking for an IT job in Kenya? Watu Credit is hiring a Tech Lead – Messaging Experience Engineering skilled in messaging system architecture, real-time communication protocols, and engineering team leadership.
responsibilities: Own the messaging dispatch layer – SMS, WhatsApp, and FCM. The architecture must support high volume, low latency, and multi-market delivery.

Own the conversational orchestration engine – the in-house logic layer that drives WhatsApp conversations, loan context notifications, payment-via-chat flows, and customer communications. No vendor lock-in on business rules.
Govern the Infobip integration: Infobip is an API provider, not an architecture decision-maker. All flow logic lives in Watu’s systems.
Own delivery reliability – message delivery tracking, retry logic, failure handling, and observability across all channels.
Design for scale across multiple markets with different carrier and channel characteristics.
requirements: Experience building conversational product systems using WhatsApp Business API or similar – not just integration, but flow design and orchestration logic.
Strong hands-on experience with one or several backend languages (Java, Python, Node.js,  …)
Understanding of event-driven messaging systems: Kafka, RabbitMQ, or equivalent at production scale.
Familiarity with SMS gateway integration, delivery optimization, and multi-provider fallback strategies.
Experience designing stateful conversational flows in a microservices architecture.
jobs.howToApply: Click here to apply

jobs.title: Tech Lead- Onboarding Engineering Job Watu Credit
jobs.description: IT Jobs, Watu Credit Jobs. Looking for an IT job in Kenya? Watu Credit is hiring a Tech Lead – Onboarding Engineering skilled in user onboarding workflows, API integration, and engineering team leadership.
responsibilities: Own the architecture of the vehicle and phone onboarding flows – from customer-facing entry points to KYC resolution and disbursement of the loan, including back-office flows and interactions
Govern Partner: review all code changes, own the architecture decisions, and hold the final sign-off on all releases. Partner executes; you govern.
Own the KYC and anti-fraud engine – design and maintain the integration layer with third-party identity verification and fraud detection providers with no vendor lock-in.
Own the B2B Licensing Portal & APIs – the technical interface through which B2B partners manage licenses. API design, security, and versioning are your responsibility.
Manage market rollout tooling – technical readiness for new market launches is a squad deliverable.
requirements: Experience building KYC, identity verification, or anti-fraud systems in a regulated financial services context.
Experience with Java and FE frameworks (Angular, React.js)
Familiarity with B2B API design patterns and partner integration governance.
Understanding of mobile-first onboarding UX constraints and the backend systems that support them.
Experience operating in or building for African markets – connectivity constraints, local identity document formats, regulatory variance.
jobs.howToApply: Click here to apply

jobs.title: Tech Lead- Payments Engineering Job Watu Credit
jobs.description: IT Jobs, Watu Credit Jobs. Looking for an IT job in Kenya? Watu Credit is hiring a Tech Lead – Payments Engineering skilled in payments system architecture, team leadership, and transactional integration.
responsibilities: Own all PSP integrations using the payment rails architecture provided by the Core Platform team, the integration layer for all payment providers (MPESA, Airtel, and others)
Own the Payment API consumed by other squads and applications. API versioning, backward compatibility, and security are your responsibility.
Own payment operational tools (reconciliation and others) – the technical logic that ensures payment records match across Watu systems and external payment provider records.
Lead technical onboarding of new payment providers – integration design, testing strategy, and production readiness are owned by this squad.
Ensure that relevant events and metrics are available for observability & monitoring of all PSP integrations
This is one of the most business-critical squads. Payments downtime has an immediate revenue impact. Your production reliability standards must reflect that.
requirements: Hands-on experience integrating mobile money APIs (MPESA, Airtel Money, or equivalent) in production at scale.
Understanding of payment reconciliation systems – double-entry accounting logic, discrepancy detection, and financial audit trails.
Familiarity with PCI-DSS or equivalent payment security standards, even in an integration or middleware context.
Experience designing payment abstraction layers that support multiple providers behind a unified internal API.
Fintech or payments engineering background in emerging countries is a strong differentiator.
jobs.howToApply: Click here to apply

jobs.title: Tech Lead – Android Experience Engineering Job Watu Credit
jobs.company: Android Experience Engineering Job Watu Credit
jobs.description: IT Jobs, Watu Credit Jobs. Looking for an IT job in Kenya? Watu Credit is hiring a Tech Lead – Android Experience Engineering skilled in Android architecture, team leadership, and mobile experience optimization.
responsibilities: Govern app development: own all architecture decisions, review all PRs, and hold final sign-off on every release. External resources are execution resources, not decision-makers.
Own the BE API that serves the Android app – designed and maintained by this squad, consumed by the app.
Own release process and QA strategy for the Android app – release cadence, feature flag strategy, staged rollout, and rollback procedures.

Own digital experience features delivered through the app – coordinate with the other squads (Device Management Engineering, Payment Engineering, Messaging Engineering, …) for cross squads features and dependencies
Drive the internal mobile engineering capability – the goal over time is to build sufficient internal Android expertise and deliver the best app experience to our clients
requirements: Strong Android development background (Java or Kotlin) – you can review any Android PR raised by developers and know whether it is good and architected/designed in the right away
Experience governing or managing an external mobile development partner – you have been the technical authority over a team that is not your direct report.
Understanding of Android app release management: Play Store submission, staged rollouts, feature flags, crash monitoring.
Experience with mobile API design – REST API design optimized for mobile consumption, offline support, and low-bandwidth environments.

jobs.title: Senior RPA Developer Job Jubilee Insurance
jobs.description: IT Jobs, Jubilee Insurance Jobs. Looking for an IT job in Kenya? Jubilee Insurance is hiring a Senior RPA Developer skilled in RPA architecture, process automation, and software development.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Software Engineering, or a related field from a recognized institution.
Professional certifications such as UiPath RPA Developer Advanced, Automation Anywhere Certified Advanced RPA Professional, or Blue Prism Developer are strongly preferred.
Professional Experience: 5+ years in RPA development, software engineering, or a related role.
Industry Exposure: Proven track record in insurance, financial services, or technology-driven sectors, ideally with RPA projects.
RPA Expertise: Experience developing bots for processes supporting 500K+ transactions or significant operational impact.
jobs.howToApply: If you are qualified and seeking an exciting new challenge, please apply viaRecruitment@jubileekenya.comquoting the Job Reference Number and Position by21st July 2026

jobs.title: Principal ICT Officer Job KSG
jobs.description: IT Jobs, Kenya School of Government Jobs. Looking for an IT management job in Kenya? KSG is hiring a Principal ICT Officer skilled in systems administration, network infrastructure, and IT security operations.
requirements: Cumulative service period of twelve (12) years relevant work experience three (3) of which should have been in the grade of Senior Information Communication Technology Assistant or in a comparable position;
Diploma in any of the following disciplines: – Information Technology, Computer Science, Business IT or any other relevant and equivalent qualification from a recognized Institution;
Membership to a relevant professional body and in good standing where applicable.

Professional certification in: – CCNP, CDCP, CCNA Cloud, CCNA Industrial/IoT, CCNA, MCSE, MCSA, MCSD, N+, A+ OCA, CISSP, Linux+, Network+, Microsoft Certified IT Professional (MCITP) or their equivalent;
Certificate in Supervisory course lasting not less than two (2) weeks from a recognized institution; and
